case_title: SHIU CHUN LEE et al VS. DAVID GUERRERO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SHIU CHUN MA, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, DAVID EIGHTEEN TRUCKING DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-03-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-18-2008
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-20-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-20-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST EMMANUEL ENYINWA, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-20-2008 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-04-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: HELEN SOREP-MATLEY. CSR	225. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-18-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-03-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-18-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST EMMANUEL ENYINWA, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-18-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-03-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES, CSR# 3689. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-18-2008 CONTINUED TO NOV-17-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-17-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
